case_title: ROBERT ISMAN ET AL VS. OMNI ELLIS, LLC

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-12-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT OMNI ELLIS, LLC
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM IS GRANTED
REMARK: EXHIBITS RECD BY MAIL 9/22/21 SUBMITTED BY DEFENDANT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY ISMAN, ROBERT ISMAN, BEVERLY AS TO DEFENDANT OMNI ELLIS, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-05-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ISMAN, ROBERT ISMAN, BEVERLY AS TO DEFENDANT OMNI ELLIS, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-05-2021 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFFS ROBERT AND BEVERLY ISMAN ARE PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT OMNI ELLIS, LLC IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. COURT NOTES THAT DEFENDANT, OMNI WLLIS, LLC'S TAX STATUS IS IN SUSPENDED STATUS WITH THE CALIFORNIA SECRETARY OF STATE AND THEREFORE CAN NOT DEFEND THEMSELVES. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ISMAN, ROBERT ISMAN, BEVERLY AS TO ASSIGNEE JAMES LEONARD LEE DBA JUDGMENT RECOVERY SPECIALIST
REQUEST: TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF ISMAN, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT OMNI ELLIS, LLC
DECLARATION RE; REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF ISMAN, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT OMNI ELLIS, LLC
REMARK: JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED, RETURN TO SENDER, UNABLE TO FORWARD

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ISMAN, ROBERT ISMAN, BEVERLY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OMNI ELLIS, LLC $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,565.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
